description: Tracks product-building and design tool repositories from GitHub signals.

items.description: 🙃   A delightful community-driven (with 2,400+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.
A modern file manager that helps users organize their files and folders.
🚀 A self-hostable personal dashboard built for you. Includes status-checking, widgets, themes, icon packs, a UI editor and tons more!
Super Productivity is an advanced todo list app with integrated Timeboxing and time tracking capabilities. It also comes with integrations for Jira, GitLab, GitHub and Open Project.
:mag: Quick file search & app launcher for Windows with community-made plugins
The world's best AI personal assistant for email. Open source app to help you reach inbox zero fast.
CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands. Single Rust binary, zero dependencies
The automatic work journal. Privately turns your screen into a timeline of what you actually accomplished. Open-source and local-first.
A virtual platform team for mobile devs who ship
Bringing Astrid Tasks back from the dead

PlainApp is an open-source app that lets you securely manage your phone from a web browser. Access files, media, contacts, SMS, calls, and more through a simple, easy-to-use interface on your desktop.
MacOS Niri and Hyprland inspired tiling window manager that's developer signed and notorized (safe for managed enterprise environments). Aiming for parity and extra innovation.
Modern & private time tracking for macOS & Windows. No cloud, no registration, no paywall. Just download and track your work hours 100% offline.
Atom Agent, automate your workflows by talking to an AI — and let it remember, search, and handle tasks like a real assistant
Curated list of lightweight native macOS apps built with Swift, SwiftUI & AppKit. Best native Mac applications for productivity, development & utilities. No Electron bloat. ⭐
